narration: These tiny warriors of your body fight off infections and diseases, but there's more to the story.

narration: Did you know there are different types? Neutrophils, lymphocytes, monocytes—they all have unique missions.

narration: Research shows they adapt to threats, even learning from past infections. Imagine that!
